title: CG 2008
text: Home * Conferences * Computer and Games 2008 < Prev Next > The venue of the Championships and Conference [1] The Sixth International Conference on Computers and Games was held from September 29 to October 1, 2008 at Beijing Golden Century Golf Club, Qinglonghu Township , Fangshan District , Beijing , China , in conjunction with the 13th Computer Olympiad and the 16th World Computer Chess Championship . Contents 1 Proceedings 2 Lectures 3 See also 4 External Links 5 References Proceedings [ edit ] Jaap van den Herik , Xinhe Xu , Zongmin Ma , Mark Winands (eds.) Computers and Games 6th International Conference, CG 2008 Beijing , China , September 29 - October 1, 2008 Lecture Notes in Computer Science , Volume 5131, 2008 Springer Berlin / Heidelberg ISBN 978-3-540-87607-6 Lectures [ edit ] [2] Maarten Schadd , Mark Winands , Jaap van den Herik , Guillaume Chaslot , Jos Uiterwijk ( 2008 ).
